title: review_lens input
description: One adversarial review lens's working set: the lens charter, the brief, the developer's diff and report, and the gate evidence. Structurally lens-blind: no sibling verdicts. Normally composed by the dev_brief parent (child spawn), not authored by hand.

workspace_path.description: The parent run's provisioned worktree at the exact reviewed state; the reviewer's read-only Norn session is rooted here.

base_commit.description: The provisioned base the parent's diff was taken against; a lens reconstructs a truncated diff with `git diff <base_commit>`.
